subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Detach thyself from all else save Me, then soar in the atmosphere of My nearness, that thou mayest witness the dominion of My majesty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امتی ان انقطعی عمن سوائی ثم طیری فی هواء قربی لتشهدی جبروت جلالی و
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @presence of; reunion with God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
